name: x-prompt-capture
description: Capture prompt tweets from X/Twitter and export deduplicated daily JSON for AI Image Prompt Gallery import.

interface.shortDescription: One-click capture of X prompt tweets to importable JSON.
interface.longDescription: Extract prompt tweets from X/Twitter, format them for AI Image Prompt Gallery import, and export to daily deduplicated JSON files.
defaultPrompt: Capture this tweet as an importable prompt template JSON.
Extract prompt text and media URLs from current tweet.
Export today's deduplicated prompt templates to JSON.
